name: Coverage: Availability heatmap renders on dashboard
description: Logged-in user sees the Availability heatmap panel with a day-by-hour grid and free-percentage indicator.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait up to 8 seconds for the dashboard to load
If language shows id, switch to English (en)
If the AI chat panel is open covering the sidebar, close it so Insights and Availability are visible
Scroll the sidebar to the Availability section
Wait 3 seconds for the heatmap to finish loading
Verify an Availability heading and a free/availability percentage or free-window summary are visible
Verify a day-by-hour color grid or heatmap cells with weekday labels are visible
